positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a sleepy fox curled up in a bed of glowing mushrooms and moss. Soft pastel colors, storybook aesthetic, highly detailed, warm light, by Beatrix Potter and Studio Ghibli. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital art, photorealism
